member_descriptions: dark carved wooden chair edge crop
white clock face with Roman numerals
light wood dining table edge crop
white round wall clock, scalloped rim
member_long_descriptions: Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical black handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the left door; reflective, slightly smudged surface with visible light scratches and reflections; largely visible in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top — estimated ~1.2 m from the camera.

Partial crop of a dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining chair showing an ornate carved openwork backrest with circular/scroll motifs and visible rear legs; lower portion is cut off by the image border and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m).

Partial, slightly blurred white circular clock face showing black Roman numerals and dark clock hands with a reflective metallic rim visible at the lower-right; crop is edge-cut and the image is low-resolution with glare, photographed from close range (approximately 0.5–0.8 m).

Partial/edge-cropped light brown wood-grain dining table top (likely laminate or veneered) with a visible rectangular edge, textured grain pattern, small surface wear and scattered papers/crumpled bag on the right; camera appears to be very close (approx. 0.5 m).

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; smooth satin finish with subtle light reflection; mostly fully visible but slightly cropped at the sides and with a small metallic/cloth occlusion near the top-left; estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte, slightly worn finish with some blur, no handle visible and edges are partially cropped — likely photographed at close range (~0.5 m).

Close-up of a white circular analog wall clock with black Roman numerals and thin black hands set in a reflective scalloped chrome metal frame; the bottom-right portion of the clock is edge-cropped and slightly blurred — estimated diameter ~25–30 cm and distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed rectangular panels and a horizontal seam, showing a worn matte finish with scuffs and small scratches; object appears partially edge-cropped vertically in the image and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial crop showing a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and a narrow vertical frame/stile at the right; smooth satin finish with slight sheen, no visible knob or hardware in the visible area, and a piece of cloth or paper overlapping the upper-left corner; appears to be approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and matte finish, showing faint scuff marks; right edge of the door is cropped by the image and the lower-left is partially occluded by a suitcase, appearing about 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining table edge visible at lower-middle of crop, glossy finish and small portion of tabletop shown behind carved chair backs; the table is edge-cropped by the image and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).

Close-up of a dark-stained wooden cabinet with two raised rectangular paneled doors, a narrow central seam/gap, visible wood grain and subtle wear; bottom edge is cropped by the image — approximately 1.0 m from camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and a small round knob at the lower-right; surface appears worn and slightly faded with decorative top molding visible, image is low-light and mildly blurred, and the left edge of the cabinet is slightly cut off in the crop — approximate distance ~1.0 m.

Partial, edge-cropped reddish-brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion; turned front leg and horizontal stretcher are visible, crop is slightly blurred and the chair is cut off by the image border — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed paneled doors filling most of the crop; top and side edges are cut off (edge-cropped), finish appears satin with faint reflections, and the cabinet is approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; smooth satin finish with subtle light reflection; mostly fully visible but slightly cropped at the sides and with a small metallic/cloth occlusion near the top-left; estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.
